messages.content:
I have implemented the task overview dashboard with the requested Material-inspired design, including task completion toggles, category badges, and a progress summary.





You can try adding a "New Task" form or a task deletion feature next to further enhance functionality.
add that sidebar with navigation to other pages like new intent page

I have updated your application to include a slide-out navigation sidebar and a new "New Intent" page using the state-based routing pattern.





Try navigating between the Dashboard and the New Intent page using the menu icon!
